title: Quiz 1 and Landscape Refinement

video.note: Students build a castle environment in Unreal Engine while recording daily screen/camera evidence for a making-of documentary.

learningTarget: I can review early Q3 production expectations and refine the castle landscape while documenting visible progress.

bellRinger.prompt: What is one change that can make a rough landscape feel more believable?

vocabulary.definition: A dated record of what was built, what was captured, what changed, and what needs to happen next.
Video captured from the computer screen to show workflow, testing, or before/after changes.
Camera or screen-recorded evidence that shows how a project was made.
Supporting footage that helps explain a process, place, detail, or action.
The Q3 Unreal scene students build, refine, walk through, and document.

slides.title: Q3 Lesson 05 - Quiz 1 and Landscape Refinement

assignment.title: Landscape Refinement Pass
evidenceRequired: Screenshot or clip showing the refined landscape.
Daily documentary clip or screen recording showing refinement work.

exitTicket: What landscape improvement did today's footage capture clearly?
